description.value:
A natural weapon attack using the creature's claws. Damage values are determined by the creature's stat block; RME properties apply on top of the creature's base attack.

Basic: Finesse, Natural, Melee, Keen, Nimble, Wound

rmeData.masterPerk: When you take the Attack action and hit with a melee attack, you can count that attack as a critical hit. Once you use this ability you cannot do so again until you finish a short rest.
